'''Denira''' was the [[Queen/Legends|queen]] of the planet [[Velmor/Legends|Velmor]] some twenty years before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was the wife of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Lorac]] and mother to Prince [[Denid]] and Prince [[Anod]].

==Biography==
Lorac's platform staunchly opposed the oppression of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and a mob of citizens loyal to the Empire raided the royal palace at [[Den Velmor]] and murdered the king and queen. The regent, [[Zelor]], took control of the throne. The older son, Prince Denid was later forced to flee from Velmor with his consort, Lady [[Loren (noble)|Loren]]. The younger son, Prince Anod, remained behind – a puppet of the Empire, patiently waiting for the day when he was old enough to be crowned rightful ruler of Velmor.
